DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BETTY DUNCAN, ROBERT CHATFIELD, DAVID BOMBERGER DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Plaintiffs' demurrer to Defendants Fluent LLC, Reward Zone USA LLC, RewardsFlow LLC, American Prize Center LLC, and Mohit Singla's answer is overruled as to all thirty-nine affirmative defenses because they may turn on factual issues that cannot be decided on a demurrer. The primary function of the answer is to give the other party notice so that it may prepare its case. (Harris v. City of Santa Monica (2013) 56 Cal.4th 203, 240.) A purported defect in a pleading that otherwise gives notice to the other side cannot be said to affect substantial rights or cause prejudice. (Id.) If, after a reasonable opportunity for discovery and factual investigation, Plaintiffs contend that Defendants lack factual support for some or all of the affirmative defenses, Plaintiffs should request that Defendants withdraw those affirmative defenses. If Plaintiffs are dissatisfied by the response, then they may bring a summary adjudication motion seeking to eliminate the affirmative defenses lacking factual support.

Orer is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS BETTY DUNCAN, ROBERT CHATFIELD, AND DAVID BOMBERGER'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Plaintiffs' motion to strike the prayer for attorneys' fees in Defendants Fluent LLC, Reward Zone USA LLC, RewardsFlow LLC, American Prize Center LLC, and Mohit Singla's answer is granted. California follows the American rule, which provides that each party to a lawsuit must ordinarily pay his own attorney fees. (Trope v. Katz (1995) 11 Cal.4th 274, 278.) Attorney fees are recoverable by a prevailing party only when authorized by contract, statute, or law. (Code Civ. Proc. 1033.5(a)(10).) Defendants have not pled any contractual or statutory basis for attorneys' fees, and admit they have not determined whether "a basis for recovery of attorney fees exists." Accordingly, Plaintiffs' motion to strike lies. (See California Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial (The Rutter Guide 2018) 7:183.) Should Defendants discover a statutory or contractual basis for attorneys' fees, they may seek leave to amend.

order is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants Mocade Media LLC, RGO Media LLC, Art Brock Holdings LLC, and CGIW Marketing Services LLC's demurrer to the sole cause of action in the first amended complaint is overruled. A motion to dismiss, not a demurrer, is the proper procedural vehicle to raise the issue of untimely service and what sanction is appropriate. On a moton to dismiss the court entertains evidence (e.g. declarations regarding why service is delayed) to determine whether a dismissal is warranted because of untimely service. A demurrer is a "non-speaking" motion that relies on the allegations in the complaint, not evidence. Demurring defendants do not highlight anything in the first amended complaint that renders it defective under the demurrer statute. Demurring defendants' statute of limitations argument lacks merit. The date of service of a complaint is an issue distinct from whether the plaintiff commenced the action within the statute of limitations. Demurring defendants fail to explain why the relation back doctrine does not apply. Any issue regarding sanctions for untimely service should be raised with department 610 and that department can address those issues at the June 19, 2018 OSC. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
